title: Isalathiso Primary wins soccer competition
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Learners from Mossel...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Learners from Mossel Bay's Isalathiso Primary School competed in a tournament for children who are older than 13 years, but still in primary school.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Learners from Mossel Bay's Isalathiso Primary School competed in a tournament for children who are older than 13 years, but still in primary school."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Isalathiso won the soccer section of the tournament.","html":"Isalathiso won the soccer section of the tournament."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The event was held at Phakamisani Primary School in Plettenberg Bay on 14 September.","html":"The event was held at Phakamisani Primary School in Plettenberg Bay on 14 September."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The reason for this tournament is that these learners do not get the chance to play in the usual fixtures for primary schools because of their older age.","html":"The reason for this tournament is that these learners do not get the chance to play in the usual fixtures for primary schools because of their older age."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Every year","html":"Every year"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Called the Over Age tournament, it is held every year for schools in the Garden Route area and a different school has the chance to host it each year.","html":"Called the Over Age tournament, it is held every year for schools in the Garden Route area and a different school has the chance to host it each year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The tournament is for rugby, soccer and netball teams and Isalathiso entered teams in each of these codes, but it was Isalathiso's boys' soccer team that excelled. In the rugby and soccer sections, girls also take part.","html":"The tournament is for rugby, soccer and netball teams and Isalathiso entered teams in each of these codes, but it was Isalathiso's boys' soccer team that excelled. In the rugby and soccer sections, girls also take part."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The soccer results were: Thembelitsha 2-3 Isalathiso, TM Ndanda 0-1 Isalathiso, Mzoxolo 0-3 Isalathiso, Phakamisani 1-2 Isalathiso.","html":"The soccer results were: Thembelitsha 2-3 Isalathiso, TM Ndanda 0-1 Isalathiso, Mzoxolo 0-3 Isalathiso, Phakamisani 1-2 Isalathiso."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sam Mgcini (coordinator of the tournament) hands the soccer trophy to the sports coordinator of Isalathiso Primary School Mvelontle Golimpi (left). Enjoying the victory with the Isalathiso players is teacher Zizo Bilana (red T-shirt).BELOW: From Isalathiso Primary School are Mvelontle Golimpi (sports coordinator), Betty Fipaza (principal), Fezile Niemand (over 13 soccer team captain), Siphokazi Dlokolo (departmental head) and Sonwabile Gana (coach). ‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"Sam Mgcini (coordinator of the tournament) hands the soccer trophy to the sports coordinator of Isalathiso Primary School Mvelontle Golimpi (left). Enjoying the victory with the Isalathiso players is teacher Zizo Bilana (red T-shirt).
BELOW: From Isalathiso Primary School are Mvelontle Golimpi (sports coordinator), Betty Fipaza (principal), Fezile Niemand (over 13 soccer team captain), Siphokazi Dlokolo (departmental head) and Sonwabile Gana (coach).
 ‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
